heroSubtitle: Premium Fashion - From classic Old Money to modern Streetwear
aboutText1: Welcome to Joumonde - your destination for exclusive fashion. We combine the timeless elegance of Old Money style with the dynamic energy of modern streetwear.
aboutText2: Our mission is to offer high-quality fashion for every taste - from classic sophistication to urban coolness.
ourStoryText1: Joumonde was founded in 2025 with the vision of combining timeless elegance with modern streetwear. Our name unites the French "Jour" (day) with "Monde" (world) - reinterpreting the world of fashion every day.
ourStoryText2: We believe in quality, sustainability and timeless design. Each of our pieces is carefully selected and combines Old Money aesthetics with urban streetwear culture.
ourMissionText1: At Joumonde, it's not just about fashion - it's about a lifestyle. We want to help people find their individual style and feel confident, whether at a business meeting or at a street festival.
ourMissionText2: Our collections are produced by the best manufacturers, with a focus on fair working conditions and sustainable materials. Premium quality for us means not only first-class fabrics, but also responsibility towards people and the environment.
premiumQualityText: High-quality materials and first-class workmanship for durable fashion pieces
sustainabilityText: Responsible production, fair working conditions and environmentally conscious material selection
customerServiceText: Personal advice, fast shipping and first-class support for a perfect shopping experience
timelessDesignText: Classic elegance meets modern trends - fashion that doesn't disappear with the season
instagramSubtitle: Discover our latest styles and become part of the Joumonde community
newsletterText: Sign up and get exclusive updates
chatWelcome: Hello! How can I help you?
modalText: Do you really want to remove all items from the cart?

Klassischer Blazer.description: This classic blazer, crafted from premium Italian wool, is made for the modern gentleman. Its timeless silhouette and refined tailoring elevate any outfit with effortless elegance. Ideal for business meetings, formal occasions, and polished everyday wear.

Polo Hemd.description: This classic polo shirt in premium Egyptian cotton blends timeless elegance with all-day comfort. Clean construction and elevated fabric make it a versatile choice for both leisure and smart casual settings. A staple that never goes out of style.
features: Contrast colored collar and sleeve binding

Knit Zip-Polo.description: The Knit Zip-Polo combines the polish of a classic polo with the ease of a quarter-zip. Made from a fine knit fabric, it offers breathable comfort and natural freedom of movement throughout the day.
features: Fine knit structure made of premium cotton blend

Chino Hose.description: These classic chinos are a timeless essential for the modern gentleman. Cut from a premium cotton blend, they strike the right balance between comfort and sophistication. Easy to style from business casual looks to off-duty outfits.
features: Adjustable inner waistband for perfect fit

Elegante Weste.description: This refined wool vest is the finishing touch for thoughtfully styled outfits. Its elegant structure and premium craftsmanship add confidence and character to your look. Perfect as a layering piece for formal and dressy-casual occasions.
features: Elegant button placket with mother-of-pearl buttons

Quarter Zipper.description: This quarter-zip, made from a luxurious cashmere blend, bridges comfort and elegance with ease. The practical zip collar lets you adjust for changing temperatures, while the premium knit feels exceptionally soft against the skin. A true investment piece for a refined wardrobe.
care: Hand wash or delicate cycle at 30°C

Strickpullover.description: This premium cashmere sweater delivers timeless luxury and exceptional comfort. Its ultra-soft handle drapes cleanly on the body for an elegant silhouette that works across occasions. A lasting classic you will reach for season after season.
features: Perfect balance of elegance and comfort
care: Lay flat to dry on even surface

Leinenhose.description: These lightweight linen trousers are a summer essential for style-conscious men. Woven from pure premium linen, they offer excellent breathability and a relaxed yet elevated look. Perfect for warm days and understated elegance.
care: Light steam or gently iron with damp cloth

Oversized Hoodie.description: The oversized hoodie is a true streetwear staple. Its relaxed cut and premium cotton construction deliver maximum comfort without compromising style. Perfect for everyday urban looks with a clean, effortless edge.
care: Tumble dry on low or hang dry
Iron on low temperature if needed

T-Shirt.description: This limited-edition graphic tee is more than just a basic, it is a statement piece. Premium cotton and exclusive artwork make it an instant favorite in any rotation. Produced in limited quantities for true exclusivity.
features: Durable colors through special printing techniques
care: Tumble dry on very low temperature
Do not iron directly on graphic

Cargo Pants.description: These cargo pants fuse practical function with contemporary streetwear style. Multiple utility pockets keep essentials close without sacrificing a clean silhouette. Built with durable construction in timeless colors for everyday wear and beyond.

Trainerhose.description: These track pants are a modern athleisure essential that balance comfort and style. The tapered fit and premium fabric make them ideal for training, downtime, and elevated everyday looks. Timeless, versatile, and made to be worn on repeat.
